title: Dangerous Firework
description: Makes all Firework rockets explode when used with an Elytra
body:
# Features
- Whenever you use any firework rocket to boost yourself with an Elytra, the player will take 
****6**** damage and smoke particles will appear
### This change will:
- Make other methods more viable in comparison to the Elytra
- Make higher level rockets more viable as they deal the same damage but allow you to travel further
# Compatibility
- This mod is compatible with any mod that adds different types of Elytras, such as Cataclysm
